title: Grounds for Denial of Application. An application for the issuance of
content: 10 license shall be denied, if the applicant fails to satisfy any of the requirements, or provides 11 or furnishes the Department with any false and spurious information or documents, or its 12 directors, sole proprietors, partners did not satisfactorily prove capacity to engage in fair 13 and ethical recruitment. 14 15
